message:
fix(database): add cancellation checkpoints throughout Postgres connect/auth pipeline
perf(raptorq): widen x86 addmul auto window based on Track-E DUAL corpus

Postgres:
  The PgConnection connect path previously only checked cancellation at
  the top of connect and connect_with_options. If a cancellation arrived
  mid-handshake (during SASL rounds, waiting for AuthenticationOk, or
  ReadyForQuery), the connection would complete uselessly.

  Add cx.is_cancel_requested() checks at six new points in the auth
  pipeline: after initial connect, inside authenticate loop entry, after
  each SASL round-trip, after AuthenticationOk, and inside wait_for_ready.
  Extract a shared cancelled_reason(cx) helper to reduce boilerplate.

  New unit tests verify all major entry points return Outcome::Cancelled
  when the context is pre-cancelled.

RaptorQ GF256:
  A broader same-target deterministic benchmark corpus (7 DUAL scenarios,
  3 command bundles) showed that widening the x86 AVX2 fused addmul auto
  window from 12KiB..16KiB total / 2KiB min-lane to 24KiB..32KiB total
  / 8KiB min-lane produces -8.99% average addmul throughput improvement
  on balanced large-lane scenarios without regressing mul auto.

  Update the X86Avx2BalancedV1 profile-pack defaults accordingly.
  AArch64 NEON defaults are unchanged. Tests updated to assert
  per-platform values. Benchmark artifact and profile doc updated with
  full ablation results, command bundles, and decision rationale.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

+  "simd_policy_ablation_2026_03_04": {
+    "scope": {
+      "scenario_family": "RQ-E-GF256-DUAL-*",
+      "scenarios": [
+        "RQ-E-GF256-DUAL-001",
+        "RQ-E-GF256-DUAL-002",
+        "RQ-E-GF256-DUAL-003",
+        "RQ-E-GF256-DUAL-004",
+        "RQ-E-GF256-DUAL-005",
+        "RQ-E-GF256-DUAL-006",
+        "RQ-E-GF256-DUAL-007"
+      ]
+    },
+    "methodology": {
+      "runner": "rch exec",
+      "bench_filter": "RQ-E-GF256-DUAL",
+      "criterion": {
+        "sample_size": 20,
+        "warm_up_time_seconds": 0.1,
+        "measurement_time_seconds": 0.12
+      },
+      "comparison_strategy": "same target dir comparator corpus; baseline then candidate overrides"
+    },
+    "command_bundles": [
+      {
+        "id": "baseline_auto_defaults",
+        "command": "rch exec -- bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; export CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-e5-20260304-dual; ASUPERSYNC_GF256_PROFILE_PACK=auto ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_POLICY=auto cargo bench --bench raptorq_benchmark --features simd-intrinsics -- RQ-E-GF256-DUAL --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 0.1 --measurement-time 0.12'",
+        "log_path": "/tmp/e5_dual_baseline_20260304.log"
+      },
+      {
+        "id": "candidate_addmul_window_only",
+        "command": "rch exec -- bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; export CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-e5-20260304-dual; ASUPERSYNC_GF256_PROFILE_PACK=auto ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_POLICY=auto ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_ADDMUL_MIN_TOTAL=24576 ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_ADDMUL_MAX_TOTAL=32768 ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_ADDMUL_MIN_LANE=8192 cargo bench --bench raptorq_benchmark --features simd-intrinsics -- RQ-E-GF256-DUAL --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 0.1 --measurement-time 0.12'",
+        "log_path": "/tmp/e5_dual_candidate1_20260304.log"
+      },
+      {
+        "id": "candidate_mul_and_addmul_windows",
+        "command": "rch exec -- bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; export CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-e5-20260304-dual; ASUPERSYNC_GF256_PROFILE_PACK=auto ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_POLICY=auto ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_MUL_MIN_TOTAL=24576 ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_MUL_MAX_TOTAL=30720 ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_ADDMUL_MIN_TOTAL=24576 ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_ADDMUL_MAX_TOTAL=30720 ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_ADDMUL_MIN_LANE=8192 cargo bench --bench raptorq_benchmark --features simd-intrinsics -- RQ-E-GF256-DUAL --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 0.1 --measurement-time 0.12'",
+        "log_path": "/tmp/e5_dual_candidate2_20260304.log"
+      }
+    ],

+        "id": "candidate_addmul_window_only",
+        "average_delta_vs_baseline_pct": {

+          "addmul_slices2_auto": -3.3759

+        "targeted_large_lane_deltas_pct": {
+          "addmul_slices2_auto_RQ-E-GF256-DUAL-004": -6.1424,
+          "addmul_slices2_auto_RQ-E-GF256-DUAL-005": -14.4411,
+          "addmul_slices2_auto_RQ-E-GF256-DUAL-006": -6.3938,
+          "targeted_addmul_auto_average": -8.9924
+        },
+        "summary": "Best candidate in this corpus: material addmul auto uplift on balanced large-lane scenarios, while mul auto remained near neutral."
+      },
+      {
+        "id": "candidate_mul_and_addmul_windows",
+        "average_delta_vs_baseline_pct": {
+          "mul_slices2_auto": 2.0837,

+        },
+        "targeted_large_lane_deltas_pct": {

+          "targeted_addmul_auto_average_RQ-E-GF256-DUAL-004_to_006": -11.2318
+        },
+        "summary": "Addmul improved but mul auto regressed; rejected for default rollout."
+      }
+    ],
+    "decision": {
+      "selected_profile_defaults": "update x86 addmul auto window",
+      "changes": {
+        "mul_window": "unchanged: disabled (mul_min_total > mul_max_total)",
+        "addmul_window": "24576..32768 total bytes",
+        "addmul_min_lane": 8192
+      },
+      "rationale": "This candidate produced the strongest deterministic corpus uplift for addmul auto across DUAL-004/005/006 without enabling mul auto regressions."
+    }

   "rollback_rehearsal": {
     "result": "pass",
     "checks": [
@@ -250,6 +328,7 @@
   "notes": [
     "All three runs emitted Track-E policy/probe JSON with deterministic manifest/profile metadata fields.",
     "This comparator capture uses short Criterion windows for fast rehearsal and should be treated as directional evidence.",
-    "Observed throughput variance indicates a full p95/p99 corpus is still required for final E5 closure."
+    "Observed throughput variance indicates a full p95/p99 corpus is still required for final E5 closure.",
+    "2026-03-04 corpus added broad RQ-E-GF256-DUAL-* coverage and selected a new x86 addmul auto window default (24576..32768, min lane 8192)."
   ]
 }

@@ -227,7 +227,35 @@ Recorded in `artifacts/raptorq_track_e_gf256_bench_v1.json` under `simd_policy_a
 - Large balanced addmul window candidate (`addmul_total=24576..32768`, `addmul_min_lane=12288`) showed no meaningful `addmul_slices2_auto` uplift (`+0.1438%`, `p=0.82`) and regressed `mul_slices2_auto` (`+2.1554%` median).
 - Mul-only window candidate (`mul_total=32768`) regressed `mul_slices2_auto` (`+0.6484%`, `p=0.02`) on the same scenario.
 
-Current decision: retain x86 profile-pack defaults (`mul` window disabled, `addmul` window `12288..16384`, `addmul_min_lane=2048`) until a broader SIMD corpus demonstrates material and repeatable p95/p99 improvement versus baseline.
+Updated decision after broader corpus (`simd_policy_ablation_2026_03_04`):
+
+- Keep `mul` auto window disabled by default on x86 (`mul_min_total > mul_max_total`).
+- Move x86 `addmul` auto window to `24576..32768` total bytes with `addmul_min_lane=8192`.
+- Rationale: same-target deterministic corpus over `RQ-E-GF256-DUAL-*` showed strongest repeatable uplift in balanced high-throughput lanes (`DUAL-004/005/006`), with targeted `addmul_slices2_auto` median deltas of `-6.1424%`, `-14.4411%`, and `-6.3938%` versus baseline (`avg -8.9924%`).
+
+Command bundle for the 2026-03-04 corpus:
+
+```bash
+rch exec -- bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; export CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-e5-20260304-dual; \
+  ASUPERSYNC_GF256_PROFILE_PACK=auto ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_POLICY=auto \
+  cargo bench --bench raptorq_benchmark --features simd-intrinsics -- RQ-E-GF256-DUAL \
+  --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 0.1 --measurement-time 0.12'
+
+rch exec -- bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; export CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-e5-20260304-dual; \
+  ASUPERSYNC_GF256_PROFILE_PACK=auto ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_POLICY=auto \
+  ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_ADDMUL_MIN_TOTAL=24576 ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_ADDMUL_MAX_TOTAL=32768 \
+  ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_ADDMUL_MIN_LANE=8192 \
+  cargo bench --bench raptorq_benchmark --features simd-intrinsics -- RQ-E-GF256-DUAL \
+  --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 0.1 --measurement-time 0.12'
+
+rch exec -- bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; export CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-e5-20260304-dual; \
+  ASUPERSYNC_GF256_PROFILE_PACK=auto ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_POLICY=auto \
+  ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_MUL_MIN_TOTAL=24576 ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_MUL_MAX_TOTAL=30720 \
+  ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_ADDMUL_MIN_TOTAL=24576 ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_ADDMUL_MAX_TOTAL=30720 \
+  ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_ADDMUL_MIN_LANE=8192 \
+  cargo bench --bench raptorq_benchmark --features simd-intrinsics -- RQ-E-GF256-DUAL \
+  --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 0.1 --measurement-time 0.12'
+```
 
 ## Calibration Checklist for Closure
